title: Launch Closure and Operator Release Package

evidence_chain.description: Resolved 3-layer root cause: timeout too short, programmatic click, missing apiConfig.js; CI run 26443569347 SUCCESS; 70/70 post-merge PASS

operator_guide.date_format_note: Slash-separated (YYYY/MM/DD) is required for Replay API date filter. Hyphen format will not match.
operator_guide.dry_run_explanation: dry_run=0 means the row is a real production replay entry, not a simulation. It counts toward official accuracy metrics. dry_run=1 rows are planning artifacts only.

freshness_guard_usage.meaning: FRESHNESS_PASS means all Batch A draws have replay rows. Any gap_detected=True requires investigation before new rows are inserted.

risk_register.resolution: 3 root causes resolved: timeout increased to 15000ms, programmatic click replaced with Playwright .click(), missing src/config/apiConfig.js added to git

risk_register.notes: Port 8000 is unrelated Personal Health Platform. Lottery API always on port 8002. All operator docs and curl examples explicitly specify 8002.
Replay API date filter requires YYYY/MM/DD slash format. Hyphen format (2026-05-21) will not match any rows. All operator examples use slash format.
lottery_v2.db is local-only and must never be staged or committed. CI uses a separate test environment. Official API ingestion is not used in this phase.

risk_register.risk: Official API ingestion not used in this phase
risk_register.notes: All replay rows in P79 were applied from local plan artifacts. Official draw API was used for verification only (read). No write calls were made to external APIs.
New draws beyond 115000041 will require an explicit source decision before replay rows can be added. Freshness guard will flag gap_detected=True when this occurs.

rollback_reference.p79_rollback_sql: DELETE FROM strategy_prediction_replays WHERE id IN (46961, 46962)
rollback_reference.note: Rollback is not part of P85. Requires explicit operator authorization. P79 backup: lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db.bak_p79_pre_apply_20260526_160020
